changelog:
v1.4.3 — BLE prov via reboot (avoids WiFi/BT race)
- /wifi_prov now sets ble_prov_pending=true in NVS and restarts the hub
- On boot, ble_prov_pending flag triggers BLE-only mode (no WiFi STA init)
- Eliminates the race where net_tick reconnects to STA while BLE is trying to start
- After successful BLE pairing, new WiFi creds are saved by the network_provisioning manager
